data.body: AC amendment: Specify production-path algorithm in script. (a) File list: git diff --name-only HEAD (not --cached). (b) Binary detection: use git diff --numstat — lines with '-\t-\t<file>' are binary. (c) Generated file exclusion list: package-lock.json, yarn.lock, *.min.js, *.min.css, *_pb2.py, *.pb.go, *_generated.*, vendor/, node_modules/. (d) Add AC: test_sample_binary_via_numstat verifies binary detection works in non-mock mode with a real binary fixture.
